title: Map Shirts
description: A mod that lets you stick and display maps on any chest plate.
body:
# Map Shirts A mod that lets players glue and display maps on chest plates. ## Crafting ![Crafting recipe for gluing a map to a chest plate. Consists of a filled map, a chest plate, and a slimeball](https://i.imgur.com/75YVVZ9.png) ![Player wearing a red leather tunic with a map on it](https://i.imgur.com/MoPFPJH.png)
